# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/project-with-automation",
    "description": "Project with automated setup and asset management",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=7.4",
        "ext-json": "*",
        "ext-curl": "*"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"file_exists('.env') || copy('.env.example', '.env');\"",
            "@php scripts/setup.php",
            "mkdir -p public/assets",
            "mkdir -p storage/logs",
            "mkdir -p storage/cache",
            "chmod -R 775 storage",
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@setup-database",
            "echo 'Installation completed successfully!'"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@php scripts/setup.php",
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@clear-cache",
            "echo 'Update completed successfully!'"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/compile-css.php",
            "@php scripts/compile-js.php",
            "@php scripts/optimize-images.php"
        ],
        "setup-database": [
            "@php scripts/database-setup.php",
            "@php scripts/migrate.php"
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "rm -rf storage/cache/*",
            "@php scripts/cache-clear.php",
            "echo 'Cache cleared successfully'"
        ],
        "download-vendor-assets": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php --vendor",
            "curl -o public/assets/vendor/jquery.min.js https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.6.0.min.js",
            "curl -o public/assets/vendor/bootstrap.min.css https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.1.3/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css",
            "curl -o public/assets/vendor/bootstrap.min.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.1.3/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"
        ],
        "setup": [
            "@post-install-cmd"
        ],
        "fresh": [
            "rm -rf vendor",
            "rm -f composer.lock",
            "composer install"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "compile-assets": "Compile and optimize CSS, JS and image assets",
        "setup-database": "Setup database and run migrations",
        "clear-cache": "Clear application cache",
        "download-vendor-assets": "Download third-party assets from CDN",
        "setup": "Run full application setup",
        "fresh": "Clean install of all dependencies"
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "process-timeout": 0
    },
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true
}
